narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive investment in semiconductors and memory hardware is driving significant momentum across the chip sector.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Positive clinical trial results for weight-loss drugs are driving strong momentum in the pharmaceutical sector.

narratives.name: Resurgent Inflation Volatility
narratives.thesis: Hotter-than-expected inflation data is creating downward pressure on broad equity indices and complicating the interest rate outlook.

narratives.name: China Geopolitical Shifts
narratives.thesis: Upcoming US-China diplomatic meetings are acting as a major catalyst for aerospace and Chinese-linked equities.

narratives.name: AI Software Integration
narratives.thesis: Companies are increasingly integrating generative AI into their core software products to drive new revenue and efficiency.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and shifting oil supply news are creating conflicting signals for energy producers.
